title: Netherite in Green
description: This resource pack makes ancient debris go green, for better visibilty.
body:
## **Ever had trouble finding netherite?**

If YES, this pack will surely save your life. Ancient debris becomes green to make it easier to spot. 



### _Recommendations_

I reccomend using this pack with a "no fog" resource pack, so you can fly in lava lakes with an elytra if you want to find a maximum of ancient debris (better with fire resistance, TRUST).
